problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
